name: Vagabond
identity: Nimble budget starter; line-best early evade
Design notes: T1 carries no signature (growth only) per design

name: Cleaver
Design notes: T1 carries no signature (growth only) per design

name: Riposte
identity: Parry duelist; top evade of the line
Design notes: T2 carries no signature (growth only) per design

name: Claymore
Design notes: T2 carries no signature (growth only) per design

name: Sanguine Sword
Effect: Grants the wielder Gaffgarion's dark sword-draw: a ranged strike that absorbs the struck foe's HP straight into the wielder.
Mechanism: Command-grant: inject Shadow Blade (ability 165) into the wielder's Squire/Knight (or Ramza Mettle) menu, held per tick (the proven Barrage path).
Shippability: VERIFIED LIVE 2026-06-15: renders with its real menu name + casts (proven on Ramza's Mettle); whitelisted to Squire/Knight + Ramza's story sword forms
Design notes: PICK. Doubles down on the innate drain - the sellsword's blade teaches the sellsword's art. Most thematic T3.

name: Stormbrand
Design notes: Chain Lightning already shipped on Stormarc (bow) - skip to avoid a dupe. ALT 'Galvanize': PA surges while the map rains / wielder is Wet (untested, flavorful).

name: Tanglethorn
identity: The line's only Immobilize / pin source
Design notes: BENCH 'Rooted': its Immobilize never expires + is uncurable (the Plague/Eagle-Eye status-hold pattern). Untested - the Immobilize bit+timer aren't mapped/held live yet.

name: Flamberge
identity: The line's only Fire sword; anti-Undead
Design notes: Its element IS its reward; no strong distinct sig that isn't a dupe.

name: Wrathblade
identity: Berserker; damage = the wielder's missing HP
Effect: Plays dead at a lethal blow, 1/battle: ignored by foes 2 turns, then springs back at ~10% HP - which loads its missing-HP damage to near-max.
Mechanism: Runtime status-hold (held Reraise + Invisible bits; up-next finishing blow).
Design notes: Already shipped (commit 23daacb). Counts toward the 3-4 cap.

name: Swiftedge
identity: Speed-knight; damage = Speed x WP, not PA
Effect: Each turn the wielder acts, Speed +1 (stacks, cap +5); taking a hit resets it to 0. Because damage = Speed x WP, the blade literally accelerates into a killing edge - keep moving, keep blurring.
Mechanism: Stat-hold growth path (proven) + new per-turn stacking & hit-edge reset logic.
Shippability: BUILT 2026-06-14 (logic + 10 tests green); PENDING LIVE VERIFY
Design notes: PICK + INVENTED. The most synergistic of the slate - the signature directly feeds its unique formula. A real combo/momentum identity.

name: Graviton
Design notes: BENCH 'Event Horizon': on hit, drag the target's LEVEL down (level-drain), or a wilder HP-swap. Untested + swingy, but very exciting on a giant-slayer. Can't force the Gravity proc to 100% (proc rate is Denuvo-walled).

name: Arcanum
identity: Arcane dispel; the melee anti-buff answer
Effect: On hit, Arcanum doesn't just dispel the foe's buff - it STEALS it: rip Protect/Shell/Haste/Reflect/etc. off the target and the wielder wears it for a few turns.
Mechanism: Status-bit transfer on the proven Poison/Doom/Charm hold family: latch the struck enemy, clear the buff bit on them, set + hold it on the wielder for N turns, then release.
Shippability: BUILT 2026-06-14 (runtime + tests; transfer proven on the Reraise/Invisible bits); COVERAGE PENDING -- map the marquee buff bits via poison_probe, then add table rows
Design notes: PICK (swapped in for Lightbringer). The anti-buff blade turns thief - rip the boss's Haste/Protect and turn it against them. Map the buff bits with the watchspan probe + a failing test before shipping.

name: Lightbringer
Design notes: Signature dropped 2026-06-14 (curator call - avoid a second ability-grant). Bench if revisited: 'Radiance' holy heal-aura (the proven Wyrmblood pattern), or granting a Holy Knight sword-wave (Northswain's Strike / Divine Ruination).

name: Warbrand
identity: Pure-power brute; highest WP of any sword
Design notes: BENCH 'Bloodlust': Adrenaline (PROVEN) - below 30% HP, Attack Boost + Move+2 for 3 turns. The brute that rages when it bleeds. Clean proven fallback if a pick is cut.
